ksa_text: Ability to conduct risk assessments and analyses of systems, processes, and operational environments to identify, evaluate, and prioritize compliance-related and operational risks.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-A-001 (Risk Management/Ability) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.515, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.515). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. Data asset valuation analysis: data ROI measurement, value quantification frameworks, infonomics application, and data quality-value correlation analysis.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.515, and Risk Management (RM) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Risk Management KSA for Data Valuation Analyst?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Risk Management competencies do not appear as Data Valuation Analyst requirements in job postings. They are allocated to specialist roles. Exclusion consistent with market patterns.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld by market evidence. Risk Management is not a Data Valuation Analyst core competency. Final decision: exclude.
